scope.fuel_semantics: The biconditionals require withinFuel; concrete replay independently proves a successful halt rather than treating exhaustion as rejection.

independent_predicate: ProofToolFormal.OneShotNFT.authorizedFor requires minting purpose, consumption of the selected seed, and exactly one token entry of quantity one under the policy's own currency symbol; entries under other policies are ignored.

axiom_boundary.symbolic_theorems: #print axioms reports Blaster.Tactic.blasterProven plus propext, Classical.choice, and Quot.sound.
axiom_boundary.counterexample_replay: #print axioms reports native reduction/compiler trust axioms plus standard quotient/classical axioms; it does not depend on blasterProven or sorryAx.
